Protocols & Placement Guidelin... How to Use FlexBeam on Lower Back
How to Use FlexBeam on Lower Back If you haven’t already, read FlexBeam Applications and Usage and How to Use Your FlexBeam before proceeding. Your lower back is important for all your exercise and fitness efforts. It is also a part of your body that gets affected by a sedentary lifestyle. It is possible for FlexBeam to assist your efforts to resolve your back issues. It may also help you prepare your lower back for a more efficient
exercise and also to fortify your back muscles. You can use FlexBeam on your lower back in two ways. One is Session A that may help you with recent back issues and preparation for
exercising. Session B may be helpful to you with ongoing back issues as well as with building your back muscles and boosting your endurance. Session A on Lower Back Use Session A every day. It involves using FlexBeam on two areas of your body. It lasts 20 minutes in total. Session B on Lower Back Hi, need help? Hi, need help? Use the same applications as above, but with an additional FlexBeam application. This means that you will have 3 applications, each lasting for
10 minutes. Use Session B every other day. Buy now
